---
title: "Georgiana Polson"
---

## Georgiana Polson

**Dates:** (b.1810/11)

**Maiden name:** (Crawley)

### Description

cousin of CMY

### Biography

She was the daughter of Captain George Crawley and CMY’s aunt and godmother Charlotte (Yonge) Crawley, later Jones;  she married the Rev. Hugh Polson;  her daughter Georgiana Alethe married Charles Warren Adams.

### Letters

- Letter from Decr 1st [or 14?] [1883]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
